overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exploring a Japanese temple complex at night during autumn. The character moves from a sacred tree courtyard, through a temple with NPCs, and up a mountain path to a large stone statue, with golden ginkgo trees and traditional lanterns illuminating the scene.

events.description: character stops walking and looks up at the sacred tree
character turns and begins running toward the temple

agents.ego_description: walking around the sacred tree, looking up at its branches, then turning to run toward the temple

entered.detail: massive golden ginkgo tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches
burning fire pit with orange flames illuminating the ground
traditional Japanese stone lantern with warm glowing light
small wooden shrine structure with curved roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a courtyard at night, centered around a massive sacred ginkgo tree with golden leaves. A campfire burns to the left while stone lanterns provide warm light. The character walks toward the tree, pauses to look up at its branches against the starry sky, then turns and runs toward a distant temple.

events.description: moves from open courtyard into temple stair area
begins ascending the stone stairs toward the temple entrance

agents.ego_description: running toward the temple and climbing the wide stone stairs

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on the stone stairs to the right
NPC standing near the temple entrance wearing blue clothing

entered.detail: large traditional Japanese temple with curved roof and red accents
wide stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance

segments.scene_description: The character runs toward an impressive pagoda-style temple, passing from the open courtyard into a more structured area. The wide stone stairs lead up to the temple entrance, flanked by NPCs sitting and standing around. Traditional lanterns line the path as the character ascends the stairs.

events.description: leaves the temple stairs for a side path around the building
turns right onto the mountain trail leaving the temple area

agents.ego_description: running around the temple building onto a narrower mountain path

entered.detail: large gray rock formations alongside the path
simple wooden posts marking the trail edge
narrower stone stairs leading up the mountainside

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the main temple, the character navigates around the building to a narrower dirt trail. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed by dense trees and rock formations. Wooden fence posts appear along the path as the terrain transitions to a mountain trail with steeper stone stairs.

events.description: continues steady ascent on steep stone stairs
emerging from dense tree cover into more open mountain area

agents.ego_description: climbing steep stone stairs up the mountainside through forested terrain

entered.detail: steep rock face rising alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character climbs steadily up a steep stone stairway cut into the mountainside. The path is narrow and winding, flanked by dense golden trees and large rock formations. As the ascent continues, the trees thin slightly, revealing more of the night sky and distant mountain silhouettes.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain summit with large stone statue

events.description: reaches the open summit clearing with the statue
stops at the statue and looks up at it

agents.ego_description: approaching the large stone statue and stopping to look up at it

entered.detail: tall stone statue of a robed figure on a rocky pedestal
small burning fire bowl at the base of the statue
flat stone surface surrounding the statue

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide summit clearing where a massive stone bodhisattva statue stands against the starry night sky. A small offering fire burns at the statue's base. The character approaches the statue and stops to look up at its serene face, surrounded by golden trees and open sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a luminous temple courtyard through a darkening mountain ascent that culminates at a serene summit. It begins beneath the golden canopy of a massive sacred ginkgo tree and a warm campfire, with the camera following the character as they turn and run toward a distant pagoda. As the character ascends wide stone stairs flanked by lanterns and NPCs, the open architecture of the temple complex gradually gives way to a narrower dirt trail enclosed by dense trees and rock formations. The scene then shifts into a steep climb up winding stone stairs cut into the mountainside, where the golden foliage thins to reveal the silhouettes of distant peaks under a starry sky. Finally, the path opens into a wide summit clearing, leading the character toward a massive stone bodhisattva statue and a small offering fire.
